title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MANDATORY PHILHEALTH COVERAGE FOR ALL SENIOR CITIZENS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7432, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9994, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ГўВЂВњEXPANDED SENIOR CITIZENS ACT OF 2010ГўВЂВі

chunks.text:
H. No. 4593; Manila Bulletin, November 10, 2014; 110 OG No. 51, 7766 (December 22, 2014)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10645, November 05, 2014 ]

AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MANDATORY PHILHEALTH COVERAGE FOR ALL SENIOR CITIZENS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7432, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9994, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ГўВЂВњEXPANDED SENIOR CITIZENS ACT OF 2010ГўВЂВі

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section 5, sub-paragraph h(2) of Republic Act No. 7432, as amended, is hereby further amended to read as follows:

ГўВЂВњSEC. 5. Government Assistance. ГўВЂВ“ The government shall provide the following:

ГўВЂВњx x x

ГўВЂВњ(h) Additional Government Assistance

ГўВЂВњ(1) xxx

ГўВЂВњ(2) Mandatory PhilHealth Coverage

ГўВЂВњAll senior citizens shall be covered by the national health insurance program of PhilHealth. Funds necessary to ensure the enrollment of all senior citizens not currently covered by any existing category shall be sourced from the National Health Insurance Fund of PhilHealth from proceeds of Republic Act No. 10351, in accordance with the pertinent laws and regulations.

ГўВЂВњ(3) x x x.ГўВЂВќ

SEC. 2. Repealing Clause. ГўВЂВ“ All laws, decrees, executive orders, rules and regulations, or parts thereof which are inconsistent with this Act are hereby repealed, amended or modified accordingly.

SEC. 3. Effectivity. ГўВЂВ“ This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the Official Gazette or in at least two (2) newspapers of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.) FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

(SGD.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

This Act which is a consolidation of Senate Bill No. 712 and House Bill No. 4593 was finally passed by the Senate and the House of Representatives on September 22, 2014 and September 24, 2014, respectively.

(SGD.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

(SGD.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

Approved: NOV 05 2014

(SGD.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
